title: 这条提示详细说明了一个从角色图像生成完整故事板并进一步制作成动画的流程，适用于需要快速生成创意内容的中文营销场景，如产品推广或品牌故事讲述。
image_alt: 这条提示详细说明了一个从角色图像生成完整故事板并进一步制作成动画的流程，适用于需要快速生成创意内容的中文营销场景，如产品推广或品牌故事讲述。
prompt_original: A super simple workflow: 2 character images → GPT Image 2.0 storyboard → Seedance 2.0 animation. Just upload two character images and use the prompt below in GPT Image 2.0 to generate a full storyboard on a single page. Prompt: Create a clean, colorful storyboard poster in a 3x4 grid layout with 12 panels on a single page. Title at the top: "[MAIN TITLE]" Each panel must include: a scene number in a small circle, a short scene title, a colorful illustrated image, a 1-2 line description under the image. Main characters must remain visually consistent across all 12 panels: Character 1: [describe main character in detail] Character 2: [describe second character in detail] Theme/story: [overall story theme] Scene breakdown: [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] [Scene title] - [what happens] Design style: cute 3D animated storybook style, warm emotional lighting, bright colors, soft shadows, child-friendly, clean panel borders, readable typography, neat poster composition, high detail. Important: Keep all 12 panels inside one single image. Make the layout clean and balanced. Keep the characters consistent in face, outfit, and colors. Make the text readable and properly placed. No cropped panels. No extra characters unless mentioned. Then upload that storyboard to Seedance 2.0 and use this prompt: Prompt: Generate a scene using the shots in the uploaded film storyboard. No text on screen. That's it.
prompt_zh: 一个非常简单的流程：2个角色图像 → GPT Image 2.0 故事板 → Seedance 2.0 动画。只需上传两个角色图像，并在GPT Image 2.0中使用以下提示生成单页上的完整故事板。提示：创建一个3x4网格布局的干净、彩色的故事板海报，包含12个面板。顶部标题：[主标题] 每个面板必须包括：小圆圈中的场景编号、简短的场景标题、彩色插图、图像下方1-2行描述。主要角色在所有12个面板中必须保持视觉一致性：角色1：[详细描述主要角色] 角色2：[详细描述第二个角色] 主题/故事：[整体故事主题] 场景分解：[场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] [场景标题] - [发生的事情] 设计风格：可爱的3D动画故事书风格，温暖的情感照明，明亮的颜色，柔和的阴影，儿童友好，干净的面板边框，可读的字体，整洁的海报构图，高细节。重要：将所有12个面板放在一张图像内。使布局干净且平衡。保持角色的脸部、服装和颜色一致。确保文本可读且位置恰当。没有裁剪的面板。除非特别提到，否则不要添加额外的角色。然后将该故事板上传到Seedance 2.0并使用以下提示：提示：根据上传的电影故事板中的镜头生成一个场景。屏幕上没有文字。就这样。
